summary: Frontend testing for TrustOffice improvements complete. All 5 specified features verified: sidebar scrolling, combined Benevolence page with tabs, Trust Units 100-unit default with remaining display, Settings Reset button clarity, and no Benevolence Log in sidebar.

integration_issues.issue: API response slow, certificates section shows 'LOADING...' for extended period. Data eventually loads but UX could be improved with skeleton loader or timeout.

passed_tests: Sidebar nav has overflow-y: auto for scrolling (line 135: class='flex-1 py-4 overflow-y-auto')
Benevolence Grants tab displays list of grants with amounts and status
Benevolence History tab shows distribution log with This Month/This Year/All Time/Documentation summary cards
No 'Benevolence Log' item in sidebar - only 'Benevolence' appears (combined into single page)
Trust Units page shows Total Authorized Units default as 100
Trust Units page has 'Remaining' display with data-testid='remaining-units' showing '{summary.remaining_units} units'
Settings page has 'Reset All Trust Data' button (not 'Delete All Data')
Reset confirmation modal shows clear warning: 'Warning: This action cannot be undone!' and lists all data types that will be deleted
Trust Units PDF certificate uses landscape orientation (backend code confirms: landscape(letter))
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.js line 135: nav element has 'overflow-y-auto' class for scrolling when content exceeds viewport
BenevolencePage.js: Combined page with Tabs component, Grants tab shows records, History tab shows distribution log
TrustUnitsPage.js line 497-498: Remaining units display with data-testid='remaining-units'
SettingsPage.js line 751: Button text is 'Reset All Trust Data'
trust_units.py line 515-524: PDF uses landscape(letter) orientation with decorative borders
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data with 2 trusts, 5 benevolence grants
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested TrustOffice improvements verified. Sidebar scrolling enabled via overflow-y-auto. Benevolence page combines Grants and History tabs. Trust Units shows 100-unit default with remaining units display. Settings Reset button has clear warning. PDF certificates are landscape with decorative borders.

benevolence_tabs.grants_features: List of grants with amount, status, date, beneficiary
benevolence_tabs.history_features: Distribution log with This Month/This Year/All Time summaries

no_benevolence_log_in_sidebar.removed_item: Benevolence Log (correctly combined into Benevolence page)

settings_reset_button.warning_text: Warning: This action cannot be undone!
